3155600.name: Sich Tactics Demo
3155600.description:
What's in the demo?


Demo showcases core battle mechanics. It includes 1 tutorial mission and 3 combat encounters with different enemies on procedurally generated arenas. There are 3 Cossack classes in player's party.

Demo DOES NOT include story missions and units' progression.


In Sich Tactics you control the party of Cossacks of different classes and fight with enemies on procedurally generated arenas.

Deep turn-based tactics

It is a small game with quick game sessions and deep tactics. One of the key features is the use of verticality to your advantage.

Cossacks of different classes

Each class has unique abilities and plays its role on the battlefield. But the real strength lies in their smart interaction.

Various enemies of vivid Ukrainian mythology

We are inspired by rich and variegated Ukrainian mythology. You have to fight with chorts, foresters, water demons... and maybe with Viy themself?

Procedurally generated arenas and scenarios

Scenarios differ in biomes, possible enemies, and consist of several complex battles arenas for which are procedurally generated.
